message:
test: proptest robustness suite for escape-parser (10 property tests)

Adds property-based testing for the terminal escape sequence parser:
- Crash-freedom on arbitrary, printable, CSI, OSC, and mixed byte streams
- Determinism: same input always yields same parse output
- Metamorphic reparse: display(parse(input)) re-parses without panic
- CSI roundtrip via display: parse → display → re-parse preserves structure
- Action::append_to coalescence correctness
- Incremental vs bulk parsing equivalence for ASCII

512 cases per property = 5120 total property checks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
